title: heliosperma pusillum subsp. moehringiifolium
intro: Heliosperma pusillum subsp. moehringiifolium, also known as the Alpine Rock Jasmine or Rock Jasmine, is a low-growing, succulent perennial plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is believed to have a calming effect on the nervous system. The health benefits of Heliosperma pusillum subsp. moehringiifolium are thought to include reduced stress and anxiety, improved sleep quality, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
